name: marmo-ui
description: MCP-backed workflow for building UI with @marmoui/ui. Bundles the marmo-ui skill, /marmo-ui:* commands, and the Marmo MCP server so agents read real component props instead of guessing. Works free without a token; add your Pro token for on-brand generation.

marmo_mcp_token.title: Marmo MCP API token
marmo_mcp_token.description: Optional Pro token for on-brand generation and patterns. Leave empty for the free Core tier. Get yours at marmoui.com/connect.

mcp_url.title: Marmo MCP URL
mcp_url.description: Override the MCP server URL. Leave the default unless running the MCP locally.
